9bc5fcf1-532d-40f8-86d1-2ba97b0b8950.name: Temperature Probe / Sensor
9bc5fcf1-532d-40f8-86d1-2ba97b0b8950.notes: Manual handheld or wireless IoT-connected; used at receiving, thawing, CCP monitoring, and transport.

8c17f733-178e-42a8-9a66-08c7e489d36b.name: pH Meter
8c17f733-178e-42a8-9a66-08c7e489d36b.notes: Used at CCPs involving acidification/pH control (e.g., fermented or acidified products).

bcf4ede9-5dde-4874-b14b-5de1a598bdb4.name: Scale
bcf4ede9-5dde-4874-b14b-5de1a598bdb4.notes: Used in batching/weighing and catch-weight verification; may be integrated with MES for automatic weight capture.

72e2305e-e782-4fef-a0f0-684b001b4bf4.name: ELISA Allergen Swab Test
72e2305e-e782-4fef-a0f0-684b001b4bf4.notes: Immunoassay-based test detecting specific allergen proteins (peanut, gluten, milk, etc.); used to verify allergen changeover cleaning.

9a076e51-1e86-42a5-84d9-8c39da37e1d0.name: ATP Swab Test
9a076e51-1e86-42a5-84d9-8c39da37e1d0.notes: Bioluminescence-based general cleanliness check; rapid pass/fail result used to verify cleaning before sanitizing or before production.

076d8f82-c969-464d-a40b-1e5413058708.name: Sanitizer Chemical
076d8f82-c969-464d-a40b-1e5413058708.notes: Common types: chlorine (bleach), quaternary ammonium compounds (quats), peroxyacetic acid (PAA); applied after cleaning, not a substitute for it.

22005d31-323d-4252-8610-41c71d08a023.name: Metal Detector
22005d31-323d-4252-8610-41c71d08a023.notes: Inline foreign-material detection for physical hazards; a common CCP.

402676d7-c0d4-45d1-9798-134b8b542939.name: X-Ray Inspection System
402676d7-c0d4-45d1-9798-134b8b542939.notes: Inline foreign-material and fill-check detection, more sensitive than metal detection for some materials (glass, dense plastics, bone).

26fc29f0-5637-42ef-87bd-820d14c68eb6.name: Vision Inspection System
26fc29f0-5637-42ef-87bd-820d14c68eb6.notes: Camera-based computer vision checking label presence, alignment, and lot code legibility at line speed.
